articles.title: Meanwood Community Nursery and Primary School to Reopen on 3 September 2026
articles.excerpt: Meanwood Community Nursery and Primary School will reopen for the new academic year on Thursday, 3 September 2026, according to the latest announcement.
articles.content_html:
Meanwood Community Nursery and Primary School will reopen on Thursday, 3 September 2026. This date marks the beginning of the new academic year for students at the school.

The announcement was made on the school-term-dates.co.uk website, providing clarity for parents and guardians regarding the school calendar.

Families are advised to prepare for the return of students on this date, ensuring that all necessary arrangements are in place for the start of term.

For further details regarding the school year, parents can refer to the school's official communications or the school-term-dates.co.uk website.
articles.legal_disclaimer: This article was compiled from identified public sources and may be updated when further verified information becomes available.
articles.right_to_reply: Anyone directly affected may request a correction or right of reply by emailing news@rochdaledaily.co.uk.
